documentation.description:
See ST Micro Programming manual PM0214:
"STM32F3 and STM32F4 Series Cortex-M4 programming manual"
May 2014 DocID022708 Rev 4, file "DM00046982.pdf"
especially section 4.6.4

simple_types.name: Bits_1
simple_types.code: type Bits_1  is mod 2**1 with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: Bits_2
simple_types.code: type Bits_2  is mod 2**2 with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Bits_6
simple_types.code: type Bits_6  is mod 2**6 with Size => 6;

simple_types.name: Rounding_Mode
simple_types.code:
type Rounding_Mode is
  (To_Nearest,
   To_Plus_Infinity,
   To_Minus_Infinity,
   To_Zero);

record_types.name: Status_Control_Register

fields.name: IDC
fields.description:
inexact result: the rounded (and returned) value is different from
the mathematically exact result of the operation

fields.name: Reserved4
fields.description:
inexact result: the rounded (and returned) value is different from
the mathematically exact result of the operation

fields.name: UFC
fields.description: overflow, result depends on rounding mode

fields.name: DZC
fields.description: invalid operation, result is a NaN
